title: doellingeria umbellata subsp. pubens
intro: Doellingeria umbellata subsp. pubens is a plant species belonging to the aster family, also known as wood asters or late wood asters, characterized by its daisy-like flowers and woody stems. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects, making it a valuable remedy for respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Doellingeria umbellata subsp. pubens include alleviating congestion, reducing fever, and soothing sore throats. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
